Defines macros for conditional and unconditional logging using `printf`.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines logging macros for use in a project. It includes conditional compilation directives to control logging behavior based on whether the `DEBUG_WRAPPER` macro is defined. If `DEBUG_WRAPPER` is defined, the `LOG_PRINT` macro uses the `printf` function to output formatted text. If `DEBUG_WRAPPER` is not defined, `LOG_PRINT` does nothing. The `LOG_PRINT_ALWAYS` macro is defined to always use `printf` to output text, regardless of the `DEBUG_WRAPPER` setting. This file is useful for managing debug and release logging configurations in a consistent manner.
